purpose: audit the runtime claims against the actual production boundary, and state plainly what is proven versus what a complete servable model still needs
production_boundary: .gravity -> reviewed adapter -> complete attention/state -> complete functional/compact block -> complete token -> sampling
the_distinction_this_audit_enforces: an integration proof where ONE substituted functional layer reaches a token is NOT proof that a complete Hawking model is runnable. The two are separated below.

gravity_artifact_verified.evidence: gravity_format.verify + gravity_functional_codec.verify: body sha256, per-tensor hashes, rate self-consistency, all-organs-deterministic

reviewed_adapter.detail: gravity_execution_adapter exists and is AST-admissible; PRODUCTION_EXECUTION_ADAPTER_REGISTRY is empty by contract (GLM functional is FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY and must not be served). No production adapter is registered because no parent has earned it.

single_functional_layer_to_token.evidence: GLM52_FUNCTIONAL_RUNTIME_RESULT.json: .gravity shard -> header verify -> payload read -> CPU authority on real captured states -> Metal parity -> MoE substituted in ONE real GLM block -> residual into layer 39 -> greedy token
single_functional_layer_to_token.explicit_caveat: this substitutes the functional MoE in a single layer inside an otherwise teacher forward; it is not a complete compact model forward

cpu_metal_parity.evidence: three Metal grammars parity-gated against the CPU authority, worst case 2.0e-4; FRT-B 7.9e-7

measured_bandwidth.provenance: measured through the runtime's own kernel at occupancy where occupancy stops binding, not a spec figure

energy.reason: no accepted on-device energy source wired; no joules inferred from FLOPs or bytes, per contract

complete_compact_block.gap: the GLM integration substitutes only the MoE; a complete block also needs the attention/state path served from .gravity, and GLM is closed FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY so it is not the vehicle. DeepSeek now has a validated streamed forward but no compact representation admitted.

complete_token_full_model.gap: no complete compact model runs all its own layers end to end; the token evidence is one-substituted-layer inside a teacher forward

true_batch_1_tps_servable.gap: true TPS requires a complete servable model. The measured 6.3->7.1 MoE-path TPS and the 5.1->49.5 bandwidth-bound ceiling are the MoE organ in isolation on GLM geometry, explicitly not a whole-model rate

prefill.gap: needs a complete servable model; not built for a closed parent

cold_and_warm_artifact_loading.measured: FRT-A one-time upload ~17.5 ms per layer readout+projection; FRT-B procedural has no persistent feature-map upload; FRT-D ~11.6 ms
cold_and_warm_artifact_loading.gap: whole-model cold load (all shards, all organs) not timed for a complete compact model

honest_summary: the runtime FOUNDATION is proven: a verified .gravity artifact, a deterministic CPU authority, parity-gated Metal grammars, measured bandwidth, active-byte and command-buffer accounting, a FEWER_FLOPS_AND_BYTES verdict, and honest UNAVAILABLE energy. A complete servable Hawking model is NOT proven: the end-to-end token evidence is one substituted functional layer inside a teacher forward, and true whole-model TPS and prefill wait on a compact representation of a parent that survives the contraction-first pilot.
endpoint_scope: this audit supports HAWKING_CORE_ASCENDED scoped to the runtime FOUNDATION, and explicitly does NOT claim a runnable complete compact model
